case_title: CHADOW, ALYSA VS BARRIOS, CARLOS DBA LA RONDILLA RESTAURANT

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHADOW, ALYSA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARRIOS, CARLOS DBA LA RONDILLA RESTAURANT $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,050.00, ON THE EVIDENCE, THE COURT FOUND THAT THE ACT OF DISCRIMINATION OCCURRED BY AN AGENT OF THE DEF. WHILE ACTING IN THE COURSE & SCOPE OF HIS DUTIES. THIS APPEARS TO BE AN ISOLATED INCIDENT AND IN NO WAY APPEARS PART OF A POLICY ON PRACTICE OF DIS- CRIMINATION. JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 26664, ON 10-24-01. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
